title: feat: menu polish — gray path below output folder
author: Pendentive

copilot.body_summary:
## Pull request overview

Updates the WhisperSync tray “Settings” menu to better separate the “Change Output Folder…” action from the informational display of the currently configured output directory

title: fix: recent dictations copy bug + right-aligned chars
author: Pendentive

copilot.body_summary:
## Pull request overview

This PR fixes tray menu actions for “Recent Dictations” so copying uses the intended dictation text (not overwritten by pystray’s positional callback args), and adjusts the m

title: fix: install torchvision from CUDA index
author: Pendentive

copilot.body_summary:
## Pull request overview

Updates the Windows installer to ensure all PyTorch-family packages are installed from the selected CUDA wheel index, preventing mismatched CPU/GPU builds that can crash WhisperSync’s worker when upstream dependencies import `torchvision`.

**Changes:**
- Add `torchvision`
